_comment: 5.5(c) nonradial 4-cluster (tetrahedral) focusing run. DESCRIBES the experiment; simulation_focusing.py is driven by CLI flags. Tests whether the focusing transition and self-convergence behavior are geometry-robust (nonradial). No universal critical-mass claim.

model.equation: d_t rho = Delta rho - chi div(rho grad c);  -Delta c + kappa^2 c = rho - rho_bar

production_note: Recommended: M=80, sigma_c=0.25 at N=8e5, H=24, tau=1e-4, seeds {0,1,2}; plus an (N,H) self-convergence check at H in {18,24,32}, N in {8e5,3.2e6}.
